title: Malaysian Muffin Stir Fry
description: A unique fusion of flavors and textures, this dish combines the crunch of a stir fry with the comfort of a muffin.
instructions: Heat the fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and stir-fry until they start to soften.
Add the snow peas and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the muffin bread and stir-fry until it starts to brown.
Pour in the Malaysian stir fry sauce and stir-fry until the bread is well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and drizzle with gooey honey.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
